prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-9LSBPBMFWL-BLCK Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 9 LED Super Bright Portable Black Mini Flashlight with Lanyard Description: The 9 LED Mini Flashlight is perfect to keep handy in case you need to view something at night or during a power outage.

9 LED Super Bright Portable Black Mini Flashlight give off more than enough light to help you find what you need in the dark, while the durable titanium body of the torch ensures the light will be ready for you. It comes with a lanyard strap for more convenient carrying.

Keep an extra torch in your glove box, kitchen drawer, and next to the back door. You never know when you'll need a light in a pinch. Search Terms: flashlights camping gear hiking gear outdoor supplies Features: - Metal Durable Body Build - 9 LED Super Bright Light - Lanyard Carrying Strap === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 9 LED Black Mini Flashlight with Lanyard

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 9 LED Mini Black Flashlight

anthropic.title_differentiation: 9 LED Super Bright, Durable Titanium Body, Portable Compact Design, Lanyard Carrying Strap

openai.title_differentiation: 9 LED Super Bright Light, Durable Metal Body, Lanyard Carry Strap, Pocket Size, Camping And Emergency Use
